summary: Completed Crisis Detection Backend with Django, Gemini, Open-Meteo, and Mock scenario injection.

Parallelised Open-Meteo, AQI, NASA FIRMS, and TomTom traffic API calls in weather_view. Removed 'sector' field and references entirely from models, logic, prompts, and test suite, and successfully ran the database migration.

Reordered sequential AI fallback chain to prioritize Gemini at Position 1, dropping AI latency to ~1-2 seconds. Wrapped DuckDuckGo/Brave searches to raise ConnectionError upon network failures, and updated smart_search_platform to break out of keyword loops early on connection failures, completely avoiding Twitter/X timeout delays.

Implemented highly optimized, token-saving AI scoring & filtering of search results. Candidates are scored, capped at 7, and sent to Gemini with only ID, platform, and title, preserving all URLs and snippets locally. In Python, dynamically reconstructed complete results details using dynamic re-mapping, cutting API token usage by over 80% and successfully passing all tests.

Completed a comprehensive and premium README.md documenting architecture flow, concurrent engine features, token quota optimization, connection failure early-abort, setup, installation, API request/response structures, and E2E test suite details.
